scripts.dev:backend: cd backend/morningai-api && source venv/bin/activate && python src/main.py
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:backend: cd backend/morningai-api && source venv/bin/activate && pip freeze > requirements.txt
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:backend: cd backend/morningai-api && source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend/morningai-api && source venv/bin/activate && flake8 src/
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend/morningai-api && source venv/bin/activate && python -m alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:seed: cd backend/morningai-api && source venv/bin/activate && python scripts/seed_data.py
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend/morningai-api && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
